Home / Section 4: BR-UK AI Advice Sessions
Section 4

BR-UK AI Advice Sessions

Catch up on our online advice sessions supporting researchers navigating this fast-evolving space.

BR-UK hosted three advice sessions which allowed those with specific questions or advice requests to connect with Dr Janna Hastings, Professor Susan Michie, Dr Amy Rodger, Dr Maggie Guanyu Yang, and Professor Robert West to discuss these.

These sessions were aimed at those who had watched our previous AI webinars and had a specific question to ask our panel or were looking for some advice.

Recordings of these sessions are available to watch by clicking the links below. The videos are hosted on the University of Edinburgh's media platform and therefore do not contain adverts.

Recordings

  • September 2025 — BR-UK AI Advice Session 1 Watch the first of three sessions
  • November 2025 — BR-UK AI Advice Session 2 Watch the second of three sessions
  • January 2026 — BR-UK AI Advice Session 3 Watch the third of three sessions

Have a question for future sessions?

Use our contact form or email Dr Amy Rodger or Dr Maggie Guanyu Yang — see Section 5.
